defs: The act of disposing, or disposing of, anything; arrangement; orderly distribution; a putting in order; as, the disposal of the troops in two lines.
Ordering; regulation; adjustment; management; government; direction.
quotes: The execution leave to high disposal.

defs: Regulation of the fate, condition, application, etc., of anything; the transference of anything into new hands, a new place, condition, etc.; alienation, or parting; as, a disposal of property.
quotes: A domestic affair of great importance, which is no less than the disposal of my sister Jenny for life.

defs: Power or authority to dispose of, determine the condition of, control, etc., especially in the phrase at, or in, the disposal of.
quotes: The sole and absolute disposal of him an his concerns.
